title: Fictional Port Delay Crisis Forecast
question: Will the fictional North Quay port clear its cargo backlog by 2026-12-31?
resolution_rule: Resolves YES if the fictional port authority reports backlog below normal operating threshold by 23:59 UTC on 2026-12-31; resolves NO otherwise; void if the source stops reporting the metric.

market.notes: Synthetic baseline for package validation only.

base_rate.notes: Toy outside-view rate from synthetic past port-delay cases.

priors.name: Comparable logistics disruptions
priors.notes: Synthetic base-rate row used only for tests.

scenarios.name: Backlog cleared
scenarios.description: Overtime and routing changes reduce backlog below threshold.

scenarios.name: Backlog persists
scenarios.description: Capacity bottlenecks remain binding into the resolution window.

updates.rationale: Synthetic initial forecast: funded overtime raises clearance odds, but chokepoint fragility keeps the forecast below high confidence.

public_notes: Synthetic package fixture for validation only. Forecasting analysis only; not financial advice.
